title: Redact secrets before they reach tracing
scenario: Logging helpers should make accidental secret exposure difficult. A wrapper can intentionally hide sensitive values when formatted.
instructions: Define Secret as a borrowed wrapper and implement Display so it always writes [redacted]. Add log_authentication_attempt that records the Secret through its Display implementation.

hints.body: Redaction should happen in the type, not at every call site.
Store a borrow so logging does not clone sensitive data.
Never expose the wrapped secret through Display or Debug output.

completionExplanation: Sensitive values now have a logging-safe representation that prevents accidental plaintext formatting.
